title: Robot Talent Show Scorecard
text:
## Robot Talent Show Scorecard

Contestant unit: {person}-{number}

Talent: {verb ending in -ing} while balancing a {color} {object} on its {body part}.

Judge notes: routine began {adverb}, then became {adjective} when {plural noun} fell from the ceiling.

Audience reaction: {emotion}, especially after the robot tried to {verb} a {food}.

Special effects included {sound}, one confused {animal}, and a smoke cloud over {place}.

Final score: {number} {noun} and {emotion}.
